title: identity.credential Facet
description: Demanded by the certificate reconcile Actuator Contract (ADR-0050) and, later, any credential Connector (ADR-0079). The CROSS-FORM projection of a credential that PROVES an identity — a cert, key, or token-ref — under which every credential form is queryable together (e.g. 'all credentials expiring in 30 days, regardless of form'). It records what proves the identity, never the secret material itself (§2.5). `scheme` is an OPEN string (§1.4): core ships the well-known values as documentation, but any form a Normalizer projects is accepted. A Facet schema exists only when a shipping Contract demands it (§1.1); single write-owner per §2.1; validated at the Projector write path (§1.2).

scheme.description: Credential form — OPEN (not a closed core enum): well-known values include cert, key, token.

subjectName.description: The identity this credential attests (a cert's CN, a token's sub/UPN, an SPN).

issuer.description: The authority that issued the credential (CA / IdP / token issuer).

notAfter.description: Expiry — the field the cross-form 'expiring credentials' projection keys on.
